description: Append-only event log for all measurable system events. Powers weekly business intelligence reports. Never update or delete rows — append only.

columns.name: metric_id
columns.description: Unique metric row ID. Format: MET-{timestamp_ms}-{random_4}

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Type of event being logged (see event_type_registry below)

columns.name: worker_script
columns.description: Which worker script emitted this event

columns.name: value
columns.description: Numeric value associated with event (e.g. quote amount, distance km)

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: JSON string with additional event context

columns.name: trace_id
columns.description: Links to Ops_IdempotencyLog.trace_id for the same processing run

setup_notes: Tab starts empty. All rows appended by MetricsLogger module. Never manually edit. For business reports, filter by tenant_id = 'nkr' and date range.
